# ShopyDash Marketplace

> ShopyDash - منصة التسوق المحلية الأولى في المنطقة. تسوق من أفضل المتاجر المحلية واحصل على منتجاتك اليومية بسهولة.

## About
ShopyDash is a modern web application designed as a local multi-vendor marketplace. It connects local shops, customers, and delivery couriers in a seamless, real-time platform.

## Features
- **Local Marketplace**: Browse local shops and discover products.
- **Unified Checkout**: Multi-store shopping cart and integrated checkout process.
- **Real-time Tracking**: Order tracking and status updates via Supabase real-time subscriptions.
- **Role-based Dashboards**: Dedicated interfaces for customers, shop administrators, and delivery couriers.
- **Localization**: Fully localized in Arabic with right-to-left (RTL) layout support.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React, Vite, TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Backend & Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Edge Functions)
- Mapping: Leaflet, Mapbox

## Important Links
- [Home](https://www.shopydash.store/)
- [About Us](https://www.shopydash.store/about)
- [Contact / Support](https://www.shopydash.store/contact)
